verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the secret, in the quiet place, In the stillness You are there, In the secret in the quiet hour I wait only for You, 'Cause I want to know You more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to know You, I want to hear Your voice, I want to touch You I want to see Your face I want to know You more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm reaching for the highest goal I might receive the prize Pressing onward, pushing every hindrance aside Out of my way 'Cause I want to know You more
